title: TacticalCraft
description: Call of duty in Minecraft? whaaaaat?
body:
**Immerse yourself in a tactical experience like never before.**

TacticalCraft Modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft gameplay with a focus on strategy, planning, and combat. With a carefully curated selection of mods, we've created a world where every decision counts and every encounter is a test of your skills.

**---Mods included---**

[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

[Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys)

[Epic Compat: ParCool](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-compat-parcool)

[Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)

[ParCool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool)

[TACZ: Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-plus)

[Time Stop Clock (used for TACZ: plus)](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-stop-clock-mod)

[TACZ: Better repair screen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-repair-screen)

[Tactical Aid](https://modrinth.com/mod/tactical-aid)

[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

[TACZ: Durability](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-durability)
